results.title: MyClone: AI Clone that scales your expertise | Product Hunt
results.content:
Aravindan Doraisamy

Congrats on the launch, Vicky! 🎉 The idea of cloning yourself to handle all those repetitive convos is honestly genius. Excited to see how this evolves - good luck!

Vignesh (Viggy) Ravichandran
MyClone

MyClone

Thanks,@araa3185   
  
Already, we are seeing realtors using it to help first-time home buyers, financial advisors using it as a premium add-on, and consultants using it for workshops and role-plays. Excited about the potential

Chilarai M
Swytchcode

Swytchcode

What?? Real spooky :)  
Awesome concept. Yeah, I need my clone to do my stuff for me

Vignesh (Viggy) Ravichandran
MyClone

MyClone

@chilarai I do recommend giving it a try. It is pretty close to your real voice.  
  
Looking forward to seeing how you use it.

Chilarai M
Swytchcode

Swytchcode [...] Your clone works 24×7 directly on your Website, CRM, Email, Slack, etc. by answering support questions, handling prospect inquiries, and even assisting during workshops. While you focus on your clients and strategy, it handles the routine conversations that keep your business running. You can even create multiple personas to handle specific situations.  
  
Also, professionals can monetize their clones with advanced access control, integrations. They are using it for market research, conducting workshops, and for role-plays. [...] MyClone

Review Momento AI?

Momento AI has received positive feedback for its innovative approach to creating AI clones. Users appreciate its potential and ease of use, with some suggesting enhancements like AI-generated faces. The platform is praised for its interactive and shareable features, allowing users to create engaging memories. While some users are curious about data practices and integration with communication tools, the overall sentiment is enthusiastic, highlighting the product's sophistication and the team's successful launch.

+2

Sprinto

Sprinto

•27 reviews [...] Hey Product Hunters! 👋 I'm happy to announce the launch of Momento AI 🎉 the world's very first turnkey and scalable AI cloning platform! Scale yourself by creating an AI clone of... you. 🤖 ⚡️Train your clone ⚡️No code ⚡️Real conversations ⚡️24/7 uptime 🚀 Train your AI clone on historically accurate and real-time data about you 💰 Earn cash from follower subscriptions to your clone 🔐Secure your AI cloning rights on Momento AI and we will make sure no one clones you before you do. Now you can have a subject matter expert in your pocket at all times. Interact endlessly with your favorite online personality. Need a friend who is always there for you and truly understands you? Find them on Momento AI ❤️ We're excited to see what your clone will do on Momento AI! Feel free to share your Momento
